privileged_info_summary: Verified that the target Price Book name 'Premium Partner Pricing Q1 2025', description, and US Dollar currency exactly match the task description. Confirmed that the prerequisite products (Wireless Bluetooth Headset, USB-C Docking Station, Ergonomic Keyboard Pro) are synthetically generated and injected into the database via setup_task.sh. Furthermore, verified that the expected discounted list prices ($59.99, $119.99, and $99.99) are accurately tracked and scored by verifier.py.
